data.title: Australia targets rogue crypto exchanges with 10% fines
data.description:
Crypto exchanges will have to obtain an Australian Financial Services License under proposed rules.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/australia-targets-rogue-crypto-exchanges/

data.title: Jia Yueting: The key to DEX success lies in user experience and community incentives, not decentralized narratives
data.description: Faraday Future founder Jia Yueting stated in a post on the X platform that the DEX market is maturing, and that success no longer relies solely on the "decentralized" narrative, but rather on providing a user experience close to that of CEXs, supported by a truly community-driven incentive mechanism. He stated that Aster's success has validated this logic, and it is also the core approach he adhered to when designing the Best Trade DeAI Agent.

data.title: IRS Introduces Digital Asset Compliance in 2026 Form W-9 Draft
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has released a draft of the 2026 Form W-9, incorporating new digital asset compliance requirements. The draft mandates that U.S. brokers collect and verify taxpayer identification numbers (TIN) for transactions involving cryptocurrencies, NFTs, and other digital assets to enhance tax reporting. Additionally, the draft provides specific guidance for sole proprietors and disregarded entities on accurately filling out their TINs, aiming to reduce the risk of backup withholding due to errors. The new regulations are set to take effect in January 2026, requiring businesses to update their compliance processes. Both individuals and enterprises are advised to ensure the accuracy of their TIN information.

data.title: Real Vision founder: Bitcoin may enter a five-year cycle, expected to peak in Q2 2026
data.description: Real Vision co-founder and CEO Raoul Pal stated in a recent podcast that Bitcoin's performance is mirroring the Institute for Supply Management (ISM) index, with interest rates following suit. The US Treasury extended the weighted average maturity of debt from four years to five years between 2021 and 2022, prolonging the original four-year cycle to a five-year cycle. He predicts the ISM will peak in 2026, potentially leading to an early inflection point in liquidity, placing Bitcoin's true peak in the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: Europeans Have Only 4 Years Left to Buy Bitcoin: Why Though?
data.description:
Key Takeaways: The countdown has begun, and few seem to realize it. By 2029, if the European Central Bank (ECB) sticks to its current roadmap, the digital euro will have become a reality.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/09/25/europeans-have-only-4-years-left-to-buy-bitcoin-why-though/

data.title: One address’s 9,152 ETH long positions were forcibly liquidated, resulting in a cumulative loss of over $45.3 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, as ETH fell below $4,000, the 9,152 ETH long positions at address 0xa523 (position valued at approximately $36.4 million) have been completely liquidated, with cumulative losses exceeding $45.3 million and an account balance of less than $500,000.

data.title: Whales bought a total of 24,000 ETH in the past 15 hours, worth approximately $96.36 million
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ember (@EmberCN), a whale redeemed its stablecoin holdings on Pendle over the past hour, purchasing 21,597 ETH for approximately $87.86 million at an average price of $4,068. This address had previously withdrawn 2,400 ETH (worth approximately $10 million) from Binance last night. In total, this address has purchased 23,997 ETH over the past 15 hours, valued at approximately $96.36 million, at an average price of $4,078.

data.title: Solus: Reinventing Fantasy Trading and the Power of AI
data.description:
Binary options platforms and prediction markets have exploded in popularity over the past decade, attracting millions of retail traders with the promise of fast profits. But while the concept is compelling—making predictions on market moves, sports outcomes, or political events—the execution has often been problematic. Many platforms operate in regulatory gray zones, resemble gambling more […]
source: https://droomdroom.com/solus-reinventing-fantasy-trading-and-the-power-of-ai/

data.title: Majidage's contract profit in the past 6 days has fallen by more than 30 million US dollars
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Huang Licheng, a former employee of the online trading platform, started trading Hyperliquid contracts in May, increasing his profits from zero to over $42.6 million within four months. However, over the past six days, he has lost approximately $30 million of his unrealized profits, currently leaving him with only approximately $11.6 million.

data.title: BitMart LaunchPrime will list XPL (Plasma)
data.description: BitMart has officially launched its new product, LaunchPrime, providing global users with a new platform for early-stage investment in high-quality assets. The first project, XPL (Plasma), has launched. The total supply of XPL is 100,000 XPL, with a subscription limit of 500 USDT per user. As part of the platform's strategic upgrade, LaunchPrime further enhances the BitMart ecosystem. With the addition of more high-quality projects, BitMart will drive the comprehensive development of the platform ecosystem and the crypto market.

data.title: Huang Licheng's ETH and PUMP long positions saw a floating loss of over $21.77 million, and he added 4.72 million USDC in two hours.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Machi Big Brother Huang Licheng (@machibigbrother) has incurred over $21.77 million in losses on his long positions in ETH and PUMP on Hyperliquid due to the market downturn. To avoid liquidation, he added 4.72 million USDC to the platform's margin in the past two hours.

data.title: International Commercial Settlement purchased 105.89 Bitcoins for a total of $1,200,000
data.description: International Commercial Settlement (00147.HK) announced on September 24 that its joint venture KeenGolden acquired a total of 105.88972 bitcoins on the open market for a total of US$1,200,000 (equivalent to HK$93,600,000).

data.title: GriffinAI: Removed GAIN official liquidity from BNB chain to protect users
data.description: GriffinAI announced on the X platform that it has removed the official GAIN liquidity pool on the BNB chain to protect user safety. The company also warned users not to interact with any liquidity pools created by the attacker, as these are unofficial and pose risks. The company also stated that GAIN on Ethereum was unaffected and that further updates will be released later.

data.title: Naver's stock price rose 11% at one point due to the news of the share swap with Upbit's parent company Dunamu.
data.description: According to market information, the share price of South Korean portal Naver surged as much as 11% intraday today. Earlier news reported that Naver's financial subsidiary, Naver Financial, is in the process of completing a full share swap with Dunamu, the parent company of Upbit. Upon completion, Dunamu will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Naver, and Naver will integrate Dunamu's business, covering shopping, finance, and cryptocurrency trading.

data.title: ZEROBASE's TVL increased by over $100 million in 3 hours after its launch on Binance Wallet
data.description: ZEROBASE, a real-time ZK proof network, added over $100 million in TVL and over 20,000 new user addresses in just three hours after participating in the Binance Wallet Booster Program.

data.title: Australia plans to legislate crypto platforms to be licensed
data.description: According to the Australian Treasury, the country has published a draft amendment to the Corporations Act 2001, requiring crypto trading platforms and tokenized custody platforms to hold an Australian financial services license. The draft will include digital asset platforms (DAPs) and tokenized custody platforms (TCPs) in the new financial product category, making them subject to the full set of licensing and consumer protection rules of existing financial institutions. The Treasury noted that the framework focuses on companies that hold user assets, rather than the digital assets themselves, and the primary regulatory model will be consistent with financial intermediaries such as portfolio operators. According to the plan, the Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) will become the licensing body, and related consultations will be open until October 24, 2025. (TheBlock)
